title: Authenticated Encryption with AES-GCM · Contract Triage
summary: An incident packet contains a plausible versioned AES-GCM record envelope with one primitive, parameter, nonce, context, key, parser, trust, timing, migration, or recovery defect; preserve the symptom and isolate first cause before repair. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in versioned AES-GCM record envelope and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence…
objectives: Use AEAD Seal and Open as atomic confidentiality-and-integrity operations and release plaintext only after successful authentication.
Design a crash-, concurrency-, rollback-, and replication-safe GCM nonce strategy within the construction limits.
Bind protocol version, tenant, object identity, algorithm suite, direction, and other non-secret context as canonical associated data.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Cryptography and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Crypto Go Aead Contract
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug cryptographic engineering team handles case 6640 during a credential migration window. Build deterministic Go evidence to validate a versioned AES-GCM envelope, nonce budget, AAD, lengths, and atomic plaintext release; keep browser execution deterministic and move production entropy, native timing, non-allowlisted crypto, network, HSM, and compliance claims to authorized transfer gates; then repeat or roll back a nonce, sequence, or key version and reject the stale state. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Use AEAD Seal and Open as atomic confidentiality-and-integrity operations and release plaintext only after successful authentication.

Inspect the Crypto Go Aead Contract trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Cryptography and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Crypto Go Aead Contract.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for use aead seal and open as atomic confidentiality-and-integrity operations and release plaintext only after successful authentication. For Cryptography and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Crypto Go Aead Contract, keep Crypto Go Aead Contract connected to executable Go behavior evidence.
